title: Tokyo,  — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Tokyo is a city in with a population of 14,094,000. Japan’s dynamic capital blending ultramodern skyscrapers with historic temples, world-class dining, and the highest cost of living in the country.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
